auth.signupSubtitle: Sign up with email or continue with Google.
auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to book your ride.
auth.verifyEmailBody: We sent a 6-digit code to {{email}}. Enter it below to finish signing up.
auth.signInRequired: Sign in to book your ride
auth.signInRequiredBody: Log in or create a Teeko account to continue booking.

home.tagline: Let's get you on your way.
home.recentEmpty: Your recent destinations will show up here.

rides.title: Rides
rides.emptyBody: Tap Home to book your first ride.

account.title: Account
account.logoutConfirmBody: You can continue browsing as a guest. Sign in again anytime to book.
account.guestCta: Sign in to save places and track rides.

trip.freeCancellation: Free cancellation. Fees may apply later.
trip.driverMatchedToast: Driver matched. On the way to you.

driver.agentOnline: Support agent online · Avg wait <2 min
driver.incentivesIntro: Complete challenges to earn bonuses on top of your regular fares.
driver.personalDocsIntro: Upload clear, unobstructed photos of each document. All documents must be valid and legible. Blurry or expired documents will be rejected.
driver.docMykadFrontHint: Show the front face clearly. Ensure all text is readable.
driver.docMykadBackHint: Show the back face with the chip visible.
driver.docCdlHint: Must be valid and show your licence class.
driver.docPsvdHint: Public Service Vehicle (Domestic) licence issued by APAD.
driver.docSelfieHint: Take a clear selfie facing the camera in good lighting. No hats or sunglasses.
driver.vehicleDocsIntro: Upload documents for the vehicle you intend to register. Each vehicle requires its own set of documents.
driver.docCarGrantHint: Vehicle Ownership Certificate (VOC) or car grant from JPJ.
driver.docRoadTaxHint: Current road tax must be valid for at least 3 months.
driver.docInsuranceHint: Insurance policy with e-hailing endorsement. Must cover all passengers per trip.
driver.docPuspakomHint: Annual vehicle inspection certificate from PUSPAKOM. Must not be expired.
driver.docVehiclePhotoHint: Clear photo showing the vehicle plate, make, and colour.
driver.reviewNote: Our team reviews applications within 1–3 business days.
driver.agreementPreamble: Please read and scroll through the full agreement before accepting. This document is also available in Bahasa Malaysia upon request.
driver.scrollToAccept: ↓ Scroll to the bottom to accept
driver.pendingSubtitle: Our team is reviewing your documents. You'll receive a notification once your account is approved — typically within 1–3 business days.
driver.whatToExpectBody:
• You'll receive an SMS and app notification when approved
• If any document is rejected, you'll be notified with details
• You can re-upload documents at any time from your profile
driver.howToUse: How would you like to use Teeko?
driver.driverCardDesc: Earn money on your schedule. Drive when you want.
driver.driverDisclaimer: Driver registration requires a valid CDL, PSV-D licence, and vehicle documents. Review takes 1–3 business days.

demo.title: Demo controls
demo.subtitle: Hidden controls for stakeholder demos. Not visible in the production build.
demo.forceNoDriversBody: Skip the search delay — go straight to the no-drivers fallback.
demo.resetBody: Clears toasts, demo flags, and the active trip. Reloads ride history from seed.
